title: Alectorolophus rusticulus
taxonomy: Alectorolophus rusticulus is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It is native to South Africa. The classification of Alectorolophus rusticulus places it within the genus Alectorolophus. The genus Alectorolophus is further classified under the family Aizoaceae, which is a part of the order Caryophyllales. This classification is based on various studies and botanical assessments.
